Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity plans, goals, initiatives and projects are contributing to compliance with related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 1-1, the organization’s cybersecurity strategy must prioritize the support of protecting its critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure managing cybersecurity risks in a methodological approach in order to protect the organization’s information technology assets as per the organizational policies and procedures and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 1-5, cybersecurity risk management methodology must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Conducting a cybersecurity risk assessment on critical systems at least once annually.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure managing cybersecurity risks in a methodological approach in order to protect the organization’s information technology assets as per the organizational policies and procedures and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 1-5, cybersecurity risk management methodology must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Creating a cybersecurity risk register for critical systems, and reviewing it at least once every month.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity in Information Technology Project Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity requirements are included in project management methodology and procedures in order to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technology assets as per organization policies, and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-6-2, cybersecurity requirements of project management and asset (information technology) change management of the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Conducting a stress test to ensure the capacity of the various components.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity in Information Technology Project Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity requirements are included in project management methodology and procedures in order to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technology assets as per organization policies, and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-6-2, cybersecurity requirements of project management and asset (information technology) change management of the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Ensuring the implementation of business continuity requirements.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity in Information Technology Project Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity requirements are included in project management methodology and procedures in order to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technology assets as per organization policies, and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-6-3, cybersecurity requirements related to software and application development projects of the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Conducting a security source code review before the critical system release.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity in Information Technology Project Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity requirements are included in project management methodology and procedures in order to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technology assets as per organization policies, and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-6-3, cybersecurity requirements related to software and application development projects of the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Securing the access, storage, documentation and releases of source code.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity in Information Technology Project Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity requirements are included in project management methodology and procedures in order to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technology assets as per organization policies, and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-6-3, cybersecurity requirements related to software and application development projects of the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Securing the authenticated Application Programming Interface (API).

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity in Information Technology Project Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity requirements are included in project management methodology and procedures in order to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technology assets as per organization policies, and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-6-3, cybersecurity requirements related to software and application development projects of the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Secure and trusted migration of applications from testing environments to production environments, along with deletion of any data, IDs or passwords related to the testing environment before the migration.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity controls are implemented and in compliance with organizational policies and procedures, as well as related national and international laws, regulations and agreements.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC control 1-8-1, the organization’s cybersecurity function must review the implementation of CSCC at least once annually.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity controls are implemented and in compliance with organizational policies and procedures, as well as related national and international laws, regulations and agreements.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC control 1-8-2, the implementation of CSCC must be reviewed by independent parties within the organization, outside the cybersecurity function at least once every three years.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity risks and requirements related to personnel (employees and contractors) are managed efficiently prior to employment, during employment and after termination/separation as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-9-3, personnel cybersecurity requirements prior to employment must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Screening or vetting candidates for working on critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that cybersecurity risks and requirements related to personnel (employees and contractors) are managed efficiently prior to employment, during employment and after termination/separation as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 1-9-3, personnel cybersecurity requirements prior to employment must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: The technical support and development positions for critical systems, must be filled with experienced Saudi professionals.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that the organization has an accurate and detailed inventory of information technology assets in order to support the organization’s cybersecurity and operational requirements to maintain the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technical assets.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 2-1, cybersecurity requirements for managing information technology assets must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Maintaining an annually-updated inventory of critical systems’ assets.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure that the organization has an accurate and detailed inventory of information technology assets in order to support the organization’s cybersecurity and operational requirements to maintain the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information technical assets.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 2-1, cybersecurity requirements for managing information technology assets must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Identifying assets owners and involving them in the asset management lifecycle for critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibiting remote access from outside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Restricting remote access from inside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and verifying each access attempt by the organization’s security operations center, and continuously monitoring activities related to remote access.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Using multi-factor authentication for all users.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Using multi-factor authentication for privileged users, and on systems utilized for managing critical systems stated in control 2-3-1-4.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Developing and implementing a high-standard and secure password policy.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Utilizing secure methods and algorithms for storing and processing passwords, such as: Hashing functions.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Securely managing service accounts for applications and systems, and disabling interactive login from these accounts.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-2-3, cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibiting direct access and interaction with databases for all users except for database administrators. Users' access and interaction with databases must be through applications only, with consideration given to applying security solutions that limit or prohibit visibility of classified data to database administrators.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the secure and restricted logical access to information technology assets in order to prevent unauthorized access and allow only authorized access for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC subcontrol 2-2-3-5, user identities and access rights to critical systems must be reviewed at least once every three months.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Whitelisting of application and software operation files that are allowed to execute on servers hosting critical systems.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Protecting servers hosting critical systems using end-point protection solutions that are approved by the organization.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Applying security patches and updates at least once every month for external and internet-connected critical systems and at least once every three months for internal critical systems, in line with the organization’s approved change managmenet mechanisms.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Allocating specific workstations in an isolated network (Management Network), that is isolated from other networks or services (e.g., email service or internet), to be used by highly privileged accounts.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Encrypting the network traffic of non-console administrative access for all technical components of critical systems using secure encryption algorithms and protocols.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Reviewing critical systems’ configurations and hardening at least once every six months.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Reviewing and changing default configurations, and ensuring the removal of hard-coded, backdoor and/or default passwords, where applicable.

Subdomain_Name: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of information systems and information processing facilities, (including workstations and infrastructures) against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-3-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting critical systems and information processing facilities must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Protecting systems’ logs and critical files from unauthorized access, tampering, illegitimate modification and/or deletion.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Logically and/or physically segregating and isolating critical systems' networks.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Reviewing firewall rules and access lists, at least once every six months.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibiting direct connection between local network devices and critical systems, unless those devices are scanned to ensure they have security controls that meet the acceptable security levels for critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibiting critical systems from connecting to a wireless network.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Protecting against Advanced Persistent Threats (APT) at the network layer.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibiting connection to the internet for critical systems that provide internal services to the organization and have no strong need to be accessed from outside the organization.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Critical systems that provide services to a limited number of organizations (not individuals), shall use networks isolated from the Internet.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Protecting against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks to limit risks arising from these attacks.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s network from cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-5-3, cybersecurity requirements of critical systems’ network security management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Allowing only whitelisting for critical systems’ firewall access lists.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of mobile devices (including laptops, smartphones, tablets) from cyber risks and to ensure the secure handling of the organization’s information (including sensitive information) while utilizing Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) policy.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-6-3, cybersecurity requirements for mobile devices security and BYOD in the organization must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibting access to critical systems from mobile devices except for a temporary period only, after assessing the risks and obtaining the necessary approvals from the cybersecurity function in the organization.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of mobile devices (including laptops, smartphones, tablets) from cyber risks and to ensure the secure handling of the organization’s information (including sensitive information) while utilizing Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) policy.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-6-3, cybersecurity requirements for mobile devices security and BYOD in the organization must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Implementing full disk encryption for mobile devices with access to critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To Ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of the organization’s data and information as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-7-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting and handling data and information must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibting the use of critical systems’ data in any environment other than production environment, except after applying strict controls for protecting that data, such as: data masking or data scrambling techniques.

Subdomain_Objective: To Ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of the organization’s data and information as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-7-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting and handling data and information must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Classifying all data within critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To Ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of the organization’s data and information as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-7-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting and handling data and information must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Protecting classified data of critical systems using data leakage prevention techniques.

Subdomain_Objective: To Ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of the organization’s data and information as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-7-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting and handling data and information must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Identifying retention period for critical systems-associated data, in accordance with relevant legislations. Only required data must be retained in critical systems’ production environments.

Subdomain_Objective: To Ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of the organization’s data and information as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-7-3, cybersecurity requirements for protecting and handling data and information must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Prohibting the transfer of any critical systems’ data from production environment to any other environment.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the proper and efficient use of cryptography to protect information assets as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-8-3, cybersecurity requirements for cryptography must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Encrypting all critical systems’ data-in-transit.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the proper and efficient use of cryptography to protect information assets as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-8-3, cybersecurity requirements for cryptography must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Encrypting all critical systems’ data-at-rest at the level of files, database or certain columns within database.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the proper and efficient use of cryptography to protect information assets as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-8-3, cybersecurity requirements for cryptography must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Using secure and up-to-date methods, algorithms, keys and devices in accordance with what NCA issues in this regard.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s data and information, including information systems and software configurations from cyber risks as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-9-3, cybersecurity requirements for backup and recovery management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Scope and coverage of online and offline backups shall cover all critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s data and information, including information systems and software configurations from cyber risks as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-9-3, cybersecurity requirements for backup and recovery management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Performing backup within planned intervals, according to the organization’s risk assessment. NCA recommends performing backup for critical systems on a daily basis.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s data and information, including information systems and software configurations from cyber risks as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-9-3, cybersecurity requirements for backup and recovery management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Securing access, storage and transfer of critical systems’ backups and storage media, and protecting it from destruction, unauthorized access or modification.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the organization’s data and information, including information systems and software configurations from cyber risks as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC subcontrol 2-9-3-3, a periodical test must be conducted at least once every three months in order to determine the efficiency of recovering critical systems backups.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely detection and effective remediation of technical vulnerabilities to prevent or minimize the probability of exploiting these vulnerabilities to launch cyber attacks against the organization.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-10-3, cybersecurity requirements for technical vulnerabilities management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Utilizing trusted methods and tools for vulnerabilities assessments.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely detection and effective remediation of technical vulnerabilities to prevent or minimize the probability of exploiting these vulnerabilities to launch cyber attacks against the organization.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-10-3, cybersecurity requirements for technical vulnerabilities management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Assessing and remediating vulnerabilities (by installing security updates and patches) on technical components of critical systems at least once every month for external and internet-connected critical systems, and at least once every three months for internal critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely detection and effective remediation of technical vulnerabilities to prevent or minimize the probability of exploiting these vulnerabilities to launch cyber attacks against the organization.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-10-3, cybersecurity requirements for technical vulnerabilities management of critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Immediately remediating for critical vulnerabilities, in line with change management processes approved by the organization.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely detection and effective remediation of technical vulnerabilities to prevent or minimize the probability of exploiting these vulnerabilities to launch cyber attacks against the organization.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC subcontrol 2-10-3-1, vulnerabilities assessments must be conducted on critical systems’ technical components at least once every month.

Subdomain_Objective: To assess and evaluate the efficiency of the organization’s cybersecurity defense capabilities through simulated cyber attacks to discover unknown weaknesses within the technical infrastructure that may lead to a cyber breach.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-11-3, cybersecurity requirements for penetration testing on critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Scope of penetration tests must cover all of the critical systems’ technical components and all its internal and external services.

Subdomain_Objective: To assess and evaluate the efficiency of the organization’s cybersecurity defense capabilities through simulated cyber attacks to discover unknown weaknesses within the technical infrastructure that may lead to a cyber breach.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-11-3, cybersecurity requirements for penetration testing on critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Conducting penetration tests by a qualified team.

Subdomain_Objective: To assess and evaluate the efficiency of the organization’s cybersecurity defense capabilities through simulated cyber attacks to discover unknown weaknesses within the technical infrastructure that may lead to a cyber breach.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC subcontrol 2-11-3-2, penetration tests must be conducted on critical systems at least once every six months.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely collection, analysis and monitoring of cybersecurity events for early detection of potential cyber-attacks in order to prevent or minimize the negative impacts on the organization’s operations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-12-3, cybersecurity requirements for event logs and monitoring management for critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Activating cybersecurity event logs on all technical components of critical systems.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely collection, analysis and monitoring of cybersecurity events for early detection of potential cyber-attacks in order to prevent or minimize the negative impacts on the organization’s operations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-12-3, cybersecurity requirements for event logs and monitoring management for critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Activating and monitoring of alerts and event logs related to file integrity management.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely collection, analysis and monitoring of cybersecurity events for early detection of potential cyber-attacks in order to prevent or minimize the negative impacts on the organization’s operations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-12-3, cybersecurity requirements for event logs and monitoring management for critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Monitoring and analyzing user behavior.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely collection, analysis and monitoring of cybersecurity events for early detection of potential cyber-attacks in order to prevent or minimize the negative impacts on the organization’s operations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-12-3, cybersecurity requirements for event logs and monitoring management for critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Monitoring critical systems security events around the clock.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely collection, analysis and monitoring of cybersecurity events for early detection of potential cyber-attacks in order to prevent or minimize the negative impacts on the organization’s operations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-12-3, cybersecurity requirements for event logs and monitoring management for critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Maintaining and protecting critical systems security events logs. The log shall include all details (e.g., time, date, ID and affected system).

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure timely collection, analysis and monitoring of cybersecurity events for early detection of potential cyber-attacks in order to prevent or minimize the negative impacts on the organization’s operations.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC subcontrol 2-12-3-5, retention period of cybersecurity’s critical systems event logs must be 18 months minimum, in accordance with relevant legislative and regulatory requirements.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of Internet-Facing web applications against cyber risk.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-15-3, cybersecurity requirements for external web applications for the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Secure session management, including session authenticity, session lockout and session timeout.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of Internet-Facing web applications against cyber risk.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 2-15-3, cybersecurity requirements for external web applications for the organization’s critical systems must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Applying the minimum standards of Open Web Application Security Project (OWASP) Top Ten.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of Internet-Facing web applications against cyber risk.
Main_Control_Description: With reference to ECC subcontrol 2-15-3-2, multi-tier architecture principle, with minimum 3 tiers, must be used.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: Cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must be defined, documented, and approved.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: The cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must be implemented.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: The cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Adopting multi-tier architecture principle, provided that number of tiers is not less than three.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: The cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Using secure protocols (e.g., HTTPS).

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: The cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Outlining the acceptable use policy for users.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: The cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Secure session management, including session authenticity, session lockout and session timeout.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of the critical systems’ internal applications against cyber risks.
Main_Control_Description: The cybersecurity requirements for critical systems’ internal applications must be reviewed periodically.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Resilience Aspects of Business Continuity Management (BCM)
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the inclusion of the cybersecurity resiliency requirements within the organization’s business continuity management and to remediate and minimize the impacts on systems, information processing facilities and critical e-services from disasters caused by cybersecurity incidents.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 3-1-3, cybersecurity requirements for business continuity management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Establishing a disaster recovery center for critical systems.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Resilience Aspects of Business Continuity Management (BCM)
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the inclusion of the cybersecurity resiliency requirements within the organization’s business continuity management and to remediate and minimize the impacts on systems, information processing facilities and critical e-services from disasters caused by cybersecurity incidents.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 3-1-3, cybersecurity requirements for business continuity management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Incorporating critical systems within disaster recovery plans.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Resilience Aspects of Business Continuity Management (BCM)
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the inclusion of the cybersecurity resiliency requirements within the organization’s business continuity management and to remediate and minimize the impacts on systems, information processing facilities and critical e-services from disasters caused by cybersecurity incidents.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 3-1-3, cybersecurity requirements for business continuity management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Conducting periodical tests to ensure the efficiency of disaster recovery plans for critical systems, at least once annually.

Subdomain_Name: Cybersecurity Resilience Aspects of Business Continuity Management (BCM)
Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the inclusion of the cybersecurity resiliency requirements within the organization’s business continuity management and to remediate and minimize the impacts on systems, information processing facilities and critical e-services from disasters caused by cybersecurity incidents.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 3-1-3, cybersecurity requirements for business continuity management must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: NCA recommends conducting periodical live Disaster Recovery (DR) test for critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of assets against cybersecurity risks related to third parties, including outsourcing and managed services as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 4-1, cybersecurity requirements for contracts and agreements with third-parties must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Screening or vetting of outsourcing and managed services companies and personnel who work on critical systems.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the protection of assets against cybersecurity risks related to third parties, including outsourcing and managed services as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the controls in ECC subdomain 4-1, cybersecurity requirements for contracts and agreements with third-parties must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Outsourcing and managed services of critical systems must rely on Saudi companies and organizations, in accordance with the relevant legislative and regulatory requirements.

Subdomain_Objective: To ensure the proper and efficient remediation of cyber risks and the implementation of cybersecurity requirements related to hosting and cloud computing as per organizational policies and procedures, and related laws and regulations. It is also to ensure the protection of the organization’s information technology assets hosted on the cloud or processed/managed by third parties.
Main_Control_Description: In addition to the subcontrols in ECC control 4-2-3, cybersecurity requirements related to the use of hosting and cloud computing services must include at least the following:
Subcontrol_Description: Hosting of critical systems and any part of their technical components must be inside the organization or within cloud computing services provided by government organizations or Saudi companies that are in compliance with NCA’s Cloud Cybersecurity Controls (CCC), taking into account the classification of the hosted data.
